prompts.prompt: Build a REST API for user authentication with login, logout, and password reset

<parameter=stages>

<parameter=task>
Build a REST API for user authentication with login, logout, and password reset endpoints. Include: 1) User registration endpoint, 2) Login endpoint with JWT token generation, 3) Logout endpoint (token invalidation), 4) Password reset request endpoint, 5) Password reset confirmation endpoint. Ensure proper security practices including password hashing, rate limiting, input validation, and secure token handling.
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
